positive: Minimalist abstract composition featuring stylized mountain peaks emerging from stylized geometric ocean waves. The design uses solid color silhouettes in a palette of deep sapphire blue, emerald green, and warm ochre. The style is clean vector art mixed with modern graphic design, giving a sense of peaceful, expansive journey. The composition must be highly symmetrical and contained within the central space, optimized for screen printing on apparel. High contrast, crisp lines, perfect balance, no gradients, vector quality, flat design, highly detailed pattern elements.
negative: blurry, noisy, artifacts, watermark, signature, text, logo, trademark, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cartoon, realistic, photographic, gradient, depth of field
